summary: Recent updates to the Web Audio API enhance its performance and reliability when handling audio data. One notable improvement includes **warn[ing] when the decodeAudioData function detects unexpected changes in audio sample rates during playback**, which helps prevent potential audio glitches and ensures a smoother listening experience. Additionally, the new system for tracking the maximum channel count per audio packet improves how audio is processed, leading to better overall audio fidelity. These changes collectively seek to provide a smoother and more robust audio experience for users engaging with web-based sound applications and features.
